title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE PAMPANGA PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GUAGUA, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA, FROM TWENTY-FIVE (25) TO ONE HUNDRED (100) BEDS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 9151 / 88 OG No. 13, 1735 (Mar. 30, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7201, February 25, 1992 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE PAMPANGA PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GUAGUA, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA, FROM TWENTY-FIVE (25) TO ONE HUNDRED (100) BEDS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The bed capacity of the Pampanga Provincial Hospital in the Municipality of Guagua, Province of Pampanga, is hereby increased from twenty-five (25) to one hundred (100) beds.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be charged against the lump-sum appropriations authorized for the purpose under the current General Appropriations Act. Thereafter, such sums as may be necessary for the operation and maintenance of the hospital shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

NEPTALI A. GONZALES

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 17, 1991 and December 11, 1991, respectively.

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: February 25, 1992

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
